name: jsdiff
when_to_use: 需要在运行时对任意两段文本、JSON 或 CSS 求可复算差异时用它而非手写比较循环,因为原生在 Myers 对齐、粒度切换与 patch 生成上失败;它只产数据不负责渲染。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能预先人肉标注短差异,做不到在浏览器运行时对未知输入可靠执行 Myers diff、稳定切换字符/单词/行粒度并生成 unified patch。

schema.ignoreCase?: boolean —— 默认 false;对支持该 option 的比较器生效

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers;结果交给 diff viewer 或消费 AI 自己着色。

outputs.changes: {value:string,count?:number,added?:boolean,removed?:boolean}[] —— 未标 added/removed 的项为相同片段
outputs.patch: string —— createPatch/createTwoFilesPatch 生成的 unified patch

api_surface.diffJson: 结构化 JSON 文本级
api_surface.createTwoFilesPatch: 生成带文件头的 unified patch

peer.note: 它是数据生产者;changes 可喂自定义 span 视图,unified patch 可喂 git-diff-view-react,若要开箱即用 React 视图可配 react-diff-viewer-continued。

isolation.evidence: Verified: +esm exports ce/pe/z/We/Se/Ee as diffChars/diffWords/diffLines/diffSentences/diffJson/diffCss and `ae as createTwoFilesPatch` — all six method imports + patch fn are real named exports in 9.0.0. README confirms `{ignoreCase: true}` option on diffChars/diffWords/diffLines. types.d.ts ChangeObject = {value, added, removed, count} (matches provides output {value,count?,added?,removed?}). +esm bundle: 0 DOM/style/event APIs — pure Myers diff.
